projectDescription: Android mobile application for managing sales, purchases, products, suppliers and cash closure for local stores
keyFeatures: Product inventory management with categories and stock control
Sales recording with multi-product support and automatic inventory updates
Purchase tracking from suppliers with cost calculation
Cash closure with daily reports and financial summaries
Dashboard with statistics and quick access to modules
Room database for local data persistence
publicApiSurface: Product - Data model for products with code, price, stock, category
Sale - Data model for sales transactions
Purchase - Data model for purchase records
Category - Data model for product categories
Supplier - Data model for supplier information
Movement - Data model for cash movements
ProductDao - Database access for products
SaleDao - Database access for sales
PurchaseDao - Database access for purchases
CategoryDao - Database access for categories
SupplierDao - Database access for suppliers
MovementDao - Database access for movements
ProductRepository - Business logic for product operations
SaleRepository - Business logic for sales operations
PurchaseRepository - Business logic for purchase operations
CategoryRepository - Business logic for category operations
ProductViewModel - UI state management for products
SalesViewModel - UI state management for sales
PurchasesViewModel - UI state management for purchases
DashboardViewModel - UI state management for dashboard
CashClosureViewModel - UI state management for cash closure
DashboardScreen - Main dashboard UI
ProductListScreen - Product listing UI
ProductRegistrationScreen - Product registration/edit UI
SalesScreen - Sales management UI
PurchasesScreen - Purchases management UI
CashClosureScreen - Cash closure UI
ProfileScreen - User profile UI
LoginScreen - Authentication UI
